data.body: Progress (session 0122D9): ADR 0029 prerequisite LANDED (commit c84cd2241) — inbound field diff now suppresses the archived/deleted→Done round-trip so a locally-archived ticket is not flipped to 'closed' by Jira's Done echo (5 RED tests green, _TERMINAL_LOCAL_STATUSES in lock-step with classify). REMAINING (444d core): the level-triggered binding-store walk that (a) reads archived-bound tickets' true state via a targeted read (archived tickets are dropped from the 'rebar list --full' snapshot — Layer 1) and (b) emits the TERMINAL_TRANSITION Decision as an archived/deleted→Done outbound status mutation through the existing apply_outbound/dispatch. This is unified with 13eb's PROBE_GET on the SAME walk. It constructs real production-Jira transitions, so per the epic it should land behind 7d23's circuit-breaker + shadow rollout. Detection is already live via 8de5's classifier consumer (bridge-fsck flags these 5 as would_terminal).
